scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && cap sync ios && cap sync android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && cap open android
scripts.build:mobile: npm run build && cap sync ios && cap sync android
scripts.build:mobile:debug: VITE_DEBUG_SUBSCRIPTION_BYPASS=true npm run build && cap sync ios && cap sync android
scripts.mobile:ios:debug: npm run build:mobile:debug && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android:debug: npm run build:mobile:debug && cap open android
